name: button-group-demo
visual_summary: A button-group-demo is a visually grouped collection of buttons. It is often used when multiple actions need to be presented but there isn't enough space for individual buttons. A developer would use the button-group-demo when providing a list of choices for a user to interact with.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready button component with the following characteristics:

Name: button-group-demo
Description: A button-group-demo is a visually grouped collection of buttons. It is often used when multiple actions need to be presented but there isn't enough space for individual buttons. A developer would use the button-group-demo when providing a list of choices for a user to interact with.
Style: e.g. default, elevated, flat
Interactions: e.g. single-select, multiple-select, drag-and-drop
Tags: button, group, collection, choices

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
